Uses of Class
com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.TaskType

  • Packages that use TaskType 
    Package Description
    com.enovka.gemini4j.domain  
    com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.request  

    • Uses of TaskType in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain

      Methods in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain that return TaskType 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      TaskType TaskType.setClassification​(TaskTypeEnum classification)
      Specifies that the given text will be classified.
      TaskType TaskType.setClustering​(TaskTypeEnum clustering)
      Specifies that the embeddings will be used for clustering.
      TaskType TaskType.setFactVerification​(TaskTypeEnum factVerification)
      Specifies that the given text will be used for fact verification.
      TaskType TaskType.setQuestionAnswering​(TaskTypeEnum questionAnswering)
      Specifies that the given text will be used for question answering.
      TaskType TaskType.setRetrievalDocument​(TaskTypeEnum retrievalDocument)
      Specifies the given text is a document from the corpus being searched.
      TaskType TaskType.setRetrievalQuery​(TaskTypeEnum retrievalQuery)
      Specifies the given text is a query in a search/retrieval setting.
      TaskType TaskType.setSemanticSimilarity​(TaskTypeEnum semanticSimilarity)
      Specifies the given text will be used for STS.
      TaskType TaskType.setTaskTypeUnspecified​(TaskTypeEnum taskTypeUnspecified)
      Unset value, which will default to one of the other enum values.

    • Uses of TaskType in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.request

      Methods in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.request that return TaskType 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      TaskType EmbedContentRequest.getTaskType()
      Optional.
      Methods in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.request with parameters of type TaskType 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      EmbedContentRequest EmbedContentRequest.setTaskType​(TaskType taskType)
      Optional.
